title: Fake Fabric Loader
description: This mod provides a fake Fabric Loader to satisfy mods that require a specific Fabric Loader version you don’t want to use (or can't).
body: --- Have you ever wanted your own **Minecraft server** but didn't know where to start? NeyHost makes it easy to create a server for a variety of use cases without needing any technical experience. Get started today and use my code `XDPXI` for **30% off your first month**! [Visit NeyHost](https://www.xdpxi.dev/neyhost) --- **NOT APPROVED BY OR ASSOCIATED WITH FABRICMC.** ## Description This mod provides a fake Fabric Loader to satisfy mods that require a specific Fabric Loader version you don’t want to use (or can't). ## Example (my use case) RRLS requires the latest version of Fabric Loader. If you’re using Quilt, updates to Fabric Loader are often delayed, and sometimes never arrive. This is where this mod helps; it pretends that the required Fabric Loader version is present, allowing RRLS to run without issues. ## Choosing a version Each release corresponds to a specific Fabric Loader version. All versions are functionally identical; only the reported version number differs.
